species: Liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry (LC–MS/MS) was used to quantify lysine crotonylation (Kcr) and lysine 2-hydroxyisobutyrylation (Khib) in peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) patients and normal controls.
tissue: in peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) patients and normal controls.
cell_type: in peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) patients and normal controls.
disease_state: To seek significant features of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) by utilizing bioinformatics analysis.
sample_source: peripheral blood samples from 11 SLE patients and 36 healthy people
3.5-ml peripheral blood samples from 11 SLE patients and 36 healthy people were gathered for Kcr proteomics analysis.
